response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in fintech and AI, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and engineering leadership at a senior level.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise
Proven track record in fintech companies like Stripe and Shopify
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI architecture
Not enough experience in engineering leadership at a senior level
No clear experience with event streaming systems or real-time inference

key_factors.factor: Lack of agentic AI architecture experience
